project_context.description: Internal Lead Funnel & Ad Performance Dashboard extending existing leads view.
project_context.target_audience: Internal sales and marketing team. 2 admin users. Data density and clarity are prioritized over marketing aesthetics.

typography.heading_font: font-sans (Use Manrope or Work Sans for distinct structure, NOT Inter)
typography.body_font: font-sans (IBM Plex Sans or clean geometric sans)

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Strict hierarchy, dense/compact spacing.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-4 or p-6 for main panels
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-md or rounded-lg (max 8px). Avoid heavy pill shapes.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-sm for cards to maintain a crisp, flat look, border border-slate-200

component_instructions.layout_integration: The existing page header stays at the very top. Immediately below it, insert the NEW Section 1 (Filters). Then NEW Section 2 (Funnel Summary), NEW Section 3 (Funnel by Source), NEW Section 4 (Lost Analysis + Sync). Below all this, retain the EXISTING Section 5 (Summary Chips) and EXISTING Section 6 (Leads Table).
component_instructions.global_filters: Horizontal flex container. Use Shadcn DatePicker, Select, and Button components. Align left. Use gap-4. Sticky positioning not required unless requested.
component_instructions.funnel_summary_panel: A grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-6 layout. Each stage is a card showing: Stage Name (label), Absolute Count (metric), Conversion Rate (badge/text - green if positive), Drop-off Rate (text - muted red). Lost stage should explicitly use muted red styling to separate it visually from the positive funnel flow.
component_instructions.source_performance_table: Dense data table. Rows: Google Paid, Meta, Organic, Direct. Columns: 6 Stages. Show count and conversion % per cell. Use soft background tints to highlight highest and lowest converting sources in the final 'Won' column.
component_instructions.lost_analysis_panel: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3). 1 column for Total Lost metric, 2 columns for Recharts horizontal BarChart showing top reasons (e.g., 'Price', 'No Show').
component_instructions.sync_status_bar: Flex container aligned to the right. Text showing 'Last sync: [time]' in text-xs text-slate-500. Add a 'Sync Now' ghost button (h-6 px-2 text-xs).
component_instructions.components_to_use: Shadcn UI (Card, Table, Badge, Button, Select). Recharts for the BarChart.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, filters, buttons, table rows, and summary cards MUST have descriptive data-testid attributes. (e.g., 'filter-date-range', 'funnel-card-won', 'sync-now-btn').

assets.icons: lucide-react (Filter, RefreshCw, ArrowRight, ArrowDownRight, TrendingUp, TrendingDown)
